name: Sort Colors
description: Given an array nums with n objects colored red (0), white (1), or blue (2), sort them in-place so that objects of the same color are adjacent, in the order red, white, blue. You must solve this without using the library's sort function. Use the Dutch National Flag algorithm with three pointers.
constraints: n == nums.length. 1 <= n <= 300. nums[i] is 0, 1, or 2.
